title: Summermon
description: The Official Modpack of the Summermon Server includes everything to provide a smooth and complete experience at Summermon!
body:
Looking for a clean, fair Cobblemon server with modern systems and no pay-to-win gameplay? Summermon offers a straightforward, community-driven experience with just the right features.

> **Land Claiming**: Protect your space. Build without fear. Explore with freedom.
> 
> **Raids**: Fight boss Pokémon in exchange for server currency.
> 
> **Player-Ran Gyms**: Face real trainers and earn badges through actual battles.
> 
> **Breeding System**: Control your team's growth through breeding mechanics.
> 
> **Mounts**: Ride your Pokémon to move faster and explore more easily.
> 
> **Cosmetics**: Customize your look with purely visual items.
> 
> **No Pay-to-Win**: Nothing sold affects player strength or progression.
> 
> **Megas, Teras & Dynamax**: Battle mechanics from various generations.
> 
> **Server Shops**: Access the essentials through a balanced in-game economy.
> 
> **Shiny Boosters (Webstore Only)**: Optional boosters available — still fair, no guarantees.
> 
> **Active Moderation & Chill Community**: Light rules, fast support, zero tolerance for toxicity.
> 

Whether you're here to build, battle, breed, or just explore the world with others, Summermon offers a stable, fair, and well-moderated environment where the focus stays on what matters: the gameplay.
